name: Barrier-Free Shower
description: Remove the tub and threshold for a completely level, step-free shower entry. The safest option for wheelchair users and fall prevention.

name: Roll-In Shower
description: A spacious, open shower designed for wheelchair access with premium finishes and full accessibility features.

name: Complete Accessible Bathroom
description: A full bathroom renovation designed around accessibility — from the shower to the vanity, toilet, and flooring.
